## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem.

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen, and which package(s) it affects
(e.g. `src/mineproductivity/analytics`).

## Architectural alignment

Explain how this aligns with the Master Architecture Handbook v1.0 / Reference
Implementation Blueprint v1.0. New top-level packages or structural changes
require architectural justification.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context here.
